title: Silky Slovakian Gelatin Pudding
description: A sweet and silky egg-free Slovakian dessert made with unflavored gelatin that is perfect for a cozy night.
instructions: Dissolve the gelatin in the water and let it sit for about 5 minutes to soften.
In a medium saucepan, heat the cream over medium heat. Add sugar and stir until fully dissolved.
Gradually add the softened gelatin mixture into the hot cream while stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon (about 10-15 minutes).
Pour the pudding into an individual serving dish or cups and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving. Serve cold with whipped cream if desired.
